problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: Combining Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
